title: service-accounts — broadcast channels
description: service-accounts publishes NO broadcast channels. The module is internal-only — every state change is either (a) a fire-and-forget event consumed by server-side modules or (b) a mail / Slack notification routed through the notifications module.
rationale: Real-time notification of SA disable / rotate / suspicious-activity events would be a valid use case for the ops dashboard, but that's a platform-admin observability concern — the correct pattern is polling the audit endpoint on the platform-admin dashboard OR subscribing to a platform-wide `platform.ops` channel owned by observability, not a per-module channel.
Service accounts have no interactive session and no browser context, so there is nothing to push TO. Machines poll the exchange endpoint for new JWTs on their own schedule.
Cross-tab session-revocation is not applicable — SAs don't hold sessions.
